title: Mechanical Design Specifications
contentHtml:
Mechanical Design Specifications

 

 

S.NO. DESCRIPTION MMDTS No. REV
1 Schedule of requirements for manufacturing/supply of corrugated sidewall complete for LHB type AC-3T paint-less coaches MMDTS16002 Rev-03
2 Schedule of technical requirement for side lower berth with comfortable single piece sliding top of LHB design AC 3 Tier sleeper coaches MMDTS 17009 Rev-NIL
3 Schedule of technical requirements for Aluminium polymer composite solid surface sheets for interior furnishing of LHB coach Toilet MMDTS 18008 Rev-02
4 Specification for thermal cum sound insulation for LHB coaches  MMDTS 18009 Rev-04
5 Specification for RMPU integration with PICCU  MMDTS 18026 Rev-NIL
6 Specification for Smart Switch Board  MMDTS 18027 Rev-NIL
7 Technical requirement for corrosion resistant. Infrared heat reflective roof coating MMDTS18028 Rev-02
8 STR for sealed window glass unit for LHB type AC coaches  MMDTS 18031 Rev-NIL
9 Specification for PU based wet on wet application on exterior painting for LHB type coaches. MMDTS 18034 Rev-05
10 Schedule of Technical Requirement for sealed window glass unit with tempered glass MMDTS 18036 Rev-NIL
11 Technical specification for flange head bolt on honeycomb partition frame MMDTS 18037 Rev-NIL
12 Specification for World class MMDTS19005 Rev-NIL
13 Specification of Universal adhesive for sealant of windows & RMPU MMDTS19012 Rev-01
14 STR for Sealed windows with better NVH characteristics for LHB AC coaches MMDTS19016 Rev-01
15 Scheldule of Technical requirements for Flexible load bearing Polyurethane foam cushion conforming to EN 45545 HL3 for Passenger coaches MMDTS19020 Rev-05
16 STR for fire barrier cloth of Seat & Berth MMDTS19021 Rev-04
17 Specification for upholstery of seat & berth MMDTS19023 Rev-03
18 STR for Electro-pneumatic Pressurise flushing system for LHB coaches MMDTS 19027 Rev-01 & 02 alongwith Addendum 01 & 02
18 STR for Electro-pneumatic Pressurise flushing system for LHB coaches MMDTS19027 Rev-03
19 STR for LHB AC Smart Coach with GPS based PAPIS, LED destination board, CCTV & OBCMS  MMDTS19030 Rev-02
20 Specification for Direct Part Marking using Data matrix (2D) on Indian Railways  MMDTS19037 Rev-NIL
21 Technical Specification For Bio Degradable, Oleophobic and Hydrophobic Organic Surface Coatng on Interior Surface MMDTS19041 Rev-03
22 TECHNICAL SPECIFICATION FOR “LIGHT RESIN TRANSFER MOULDING (LRTM) COMPONENT” FOR ALL PASSENGER COACHES MMDTS19044 Rev-NIL
23 Amendment in Specification for GFRE (RDSO/2014/CG-04 issued in April'2015) MMDTS20012 Rev-NIL
24 STR for Design, Development, Supply and installation of Compactor SS Dustbin for LHB coaches MMDTS20030 Rev.-02
25 STR for foot operated water tap arrangement in Lavatories of Indian Railways MMDTS 20031 Rev-01

26

 Technical Specification of Fire Retardant Composite Panel MMDTS 20039 Rev-01
27 STR for “Smart film switchable alongwith coach wiring & switches” to be provided on glass window MMDTS 21001 Rev-Nil
28 Technical specification for Roller blinds for all type of LHB coaches MMDTS 21002 Rev-Nil
29

Schedule of Technical Requirements for Anodized Aluminum Braille stickers for signage on Railway coaches

(MMDTS 22001 Rev-Nil dated 25.06.20222 with Amendment slip no. 1 dated 28.12.2023 & Amendment slip no. 2 dated 10.06.2024)

 MMDTS22001

Rev.-Nil

Amd-01 & Amd-02
30

Technical Specification for Thermoformable Decorative Polymerized Composite Panel (TDPCP) for interior panels & Modular Toilets

MMDTS 24004

 

 Rev-0
31 Locking Pin to PL 33500496 MCF Approved Checklist of M&P  MD44131 dated 11.08.2025  
32 Longitudinal Stop End Plate to PL 33509440 Approved Checklist of M&P MD44131 dated 25.08.2025  

 

List of MCF Specifications which have been withdrawn.

 

Note: Turnkey Documents ( MMDTS19042, MMDTS 20035 , MMDTS 20035, MMDTS 20036, MMDTS 20037,  MMDTS 21006, MMDTS 23003) have been placed on MCF website Under Section : Department>>Design>>Resources>>Turnkey Documents
